title: Earthquake Report
text:
This site tracks global earthquake activity using data from the USGS Earthquake Hazards Program. It updates daily and covers all earthquakes of magnitude 4.5 or greater worldwide over the past 30 days.
See the Report page for the full analysis, including maps, charts, and summary statistics.

title: Global Earthquake Activity
text:
library(tidyverse)

clean <- read_csv("data/clean/earthquakes-clean.csv",
                   show_col_types = FALSE)

strongest <- clean |> slice_max(mag, n = 1)

title: Global Earthquake Activity
text:
Summary
In the past 30 days, USGS recorded 505 earthquakes of magnitude 4.5 or greater worldwide. The strongest was a magnitude 7.5 event near 166 km W of Neiafu, Tonga on March 24, 2026. The median magnitude was 4.8, and 15 earthquakes reached magnitude 6.0 or higher.

title: Global Earthquake Activity
text:
Strongest Earthquakes

clean |>
  slice_max(mag, n = 10) |>
  mutate(
    date = format(date, "%b %d"),
    depth = paste0(round(depth), " km"),
    mag = round(mag, 1)
  ) |>
  select(Date = date, Magnitude = mag, Depth = depth, Location = place) |>
  knitr::kable()

title: Global Earthquake Activity
text:
Earthquakes Over Time

daily <- clean |>
  count(date)

ggplot(daily, aes(x = date, y = n)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#2c3e50", alpha = 0.8) +
  labs(
    title = "Earthquakes Per Day (M4.5+)",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

title: Global Earthquake Activity
text:
Magnitude Distribution

ggplot(clean, aes(x = mag)) +
  geom_histogram(binwidth = 0.2, fill = "#1f9ac9", color = "white") +
  labs(
    title = "Magnitude Distribution",
    x = "Magnitude",
    y = "Count"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13)

title: Global Earthquake Activity
text:
Where They Happened

world <- map_data("world")

ggplot() +
  geom_polygon(
    data = world,
    aes(x = long, y = lat, group = group),
    fill = "grey90", color = "grey80", linewidth = 0.2
  ) +
  geom_point(
    data = clean,
    aes(x = longitude, y = latitude, size = mag, color = mag),
    alpha = 0.6
  ) +
  scale_color_viridis_c(option = "inferno", end = 0.9) +
  scale_size_continuous(range = c(0.5, 4)) +
  labs(
    title = "Global Earthquake Locations (Past 30 Days, M4.5+)",
    color = "Magnitude",
    size = "Magnitude"
  ) +
  coord_fixed(1.3) +
  theme_void(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "bottom")

title: Global Earthquake Activity
text:
Most Active Regions

clean |>
  count(region, sort = TRUE) |>
  slice_head(n = 10) |>
  rename(Region = region, Earthquakes = n) |>
  knitr::kable()
